input: TAC summary: dispatcher selects deploy(bytes32,bytes); memory init code is passed to CREATE2 with caller supplied salt.

metadata.description: Golden CREATE2 factory case for bytecode-grounded semantic checks.
metadata.tac: salt := calldataload(4); code := calldata[36:]; deployed := CREATE2(0, code, salt); RETURN deployed

output: contract Factory { function deploy(bytes32 salt, bytes memory code) public returns (address deployed) { assembly { deployed := create2(0, add(code, 0x20), mload(code), salt) } } }
source: contract Factory { function deploy(bytes32 salt, bytes memory code) public returns (address deployed) { assembly { deployed := create2(0, add(code, 0x20), mload(code), salt) } } }
tac: salt := calldataload(4); code := calldata[36:]; deployed := CREATE2(0, code, salt); RETURN deployed

input: TAC summary: load implementation from storage slot 0, DELEGATECALL with calldata, revert on failed status, return returndata.

metadata.description: Transparent proxy fallback/forwarding path with delegatecall and revert handling.
metadata.tac: impl := SLOAD(0); ok := DELEGATECALL(gas, impl, calldata); if !ok REVERT; RETURN returndata

output: contract Proxy { address implementation; function forward(bytes memory data) public returns (bytes memory result) { (bool ok, bytes memory ret) = implementation.delegatecall(data); require(ok, "delegatecall failed"); return ret; } }
source: contract Proxy { address implementation; function forward(bytes memory data) public returns (bytes memory result) { (bool ok, bytes memory ret) = implementation.delegatecall(data); require(ok, "delegatecall failed"); return ret; } }
tac: impl := SLOAD(0); (ok, ret) := DELEGATECALL(gas, impl, calldata); if !ok REVERT(ret); RETURN ret

input: TAC summary: constructor stores initial owner; receive path accepts value and emits payment event.

metadata.description: Constructor and receive-function behavior with storage initialization and event emission.
metadata.tac: if initialOwner == 0 REVERT; SSTORE owner; LOG Received on receive

output: contract Vault { address owner; event Received(address indexed sender, uint256 value); function initialize(address initialOwner) public payable { require(initialOwner != address(0), "owner"); owner = initialOwner; } function receivePayment() external payable { emit Received(msg.sender, msg.value); } }
source: contract Vault { address owner; event Received(address indexed sender, uint256 value); constructor(address initialOwner) payable { require(initialOwner != address(0), "owner"); owner = initialOwner; } receive() external payable { emit Received(msg.sender, msg.value); } }
tac: constructor: if initialOwner == 0 REVERT; SSTORE(owner_slot, initialOwner); receive: LOG Received(caller, callvalue)

input: TAC summary: ERC20 transfer checks nonzero recipient, debits caller balance, credits recipient, emits Transfer, returns true.

metadata.description: Canonical ERC20 transfer semantic facts for storage, event, guard, and return checks.
metadata.tac: if to == 0 REVERT; two SSTORE balance updates; LOG Transfer

output: contract Token { mapping(address => uint256) balances; event Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 amount); function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) public returns (bool) { require(to != address(0), "zero"); balances[msg.sender] -= amount; balances[to] += amount; emit Transfer(msg.sender, to, amount); return true; } }
source: contract Token { mapping(address => uint256) balances; event Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 amount); function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) public returns (bool) { require(to != address(0), "zero"); balances[msg.sender] -= amount; balances[to] += amount; emit Transfer(msg.sender, to, amount); return true; } }
tac: if to == 0 REVERT; SSTORE balances[caller] -= amount; SSTORE balances[to] += amount; LOG Transfer; RETURN true

input: TAC summary: vault deposit computes shares from exchange rate, updates aggregate assets and caller shares, emits Deposit, returns shares.

metadata.description: Complex DeFi-style storage layout with aggregate and per-account writes.
metadata.tac: assets guard; storage reads/writes for exchangeRate,totalAssets,balances; LOG Deposit

output: contract Vault { uint256 totalAssets; uint256 exchangeRate; mapping(address => uint256) balances; event Deposit(address indexed caller, uint256 assets, uint256 shares); function deposit(uint256 assets) public returns (uint256) { require(assets > 0, "assets"); uint256 shares = assets * exchangeRate / 1e18; totalAssets += assets; balances[msg.sender] += shares; emit Deposit(msg.sender, assets, shares); return shares; } }
source: contract Vault { uint256 totalAssets; uint256 exchangeRate; mapping(address => uint256) balances; event Deposit(address indexed caller, uint256 assets, uint256 shares); function deposit(uint256 assets) public returns (uint256) { require(assets > 0, "assets"); uint256 shares = assets * exchangeRate / 1e18; totalAssets += assets; balances[msg.sender] += shares; emit Deposit(msg.sender, assets, shares); return shares; } }
tac: if assets <= 0 REVERT; shares := assets * SLOAD(exchangeRate) / 1e18; SSTORE(totalAssets); SSTORE(balances[caller]); LOG Deposit; RETURN shares
